rationale: Previous attempt asserted antecedent conjuncts as free facts; they live on the LHS of `==>` so were unprovable. Gate the entire antecedent in an `if` (else-branch makes the implication trivial), then in the then-branch derive `post1.my_end_point() == post2.my_end_point()` and re-instantiate the per-run `forall|i| ... is Send` triggers so z3 has matching shapes for both runs.
